attributes.content:
## Overview

The Design System card gives the workspace a structured home for design system documentation: components, tokens, usage guidelines, and examples.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Design System usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Document]]** -- Design System can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Design System into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Skill Card]]** -- Skills can define how agents classify, write, or transform Design System in repeatable ways.
- **[[Coding Standard]]** -- Coding Standard can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Design System.
- **[[Brand Voice]]** -- Brand Voice can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Design System.
- **[[Writing Style]]** -- Writing Style can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Design System.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Design System as the structured home for design system documentation: components, tokens, usage guidelines, and examples and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Design System when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Design System stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
